title: Lettering on the iPad Pro + Free Download!
excerpt: Though I don't plan on doing Motivational Monday every week this year, I do want to continue to share inspiring quotes and new things with you. Ever since I got my iPad Pro late last year, I have been really…
body:
Though I don't plan on doing Motivational Monday every week this year, I do want to continue to share inspiring quotes and new things with you. Ever since I got my iPad Pro late last year, I have been really into playing around with the Procreate app. Many of you have asked for a tutorial, so here is my version of that in a YouTube video:

Get your FREE DOWNLOAD HERE!

I have a BIG, HUGE announcement coming very soon! If you're a newsletter subscriber, perhaps you may have already gotten the email! EEPS!
